mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CHAT_ROOM (ROOM_ID, ROOM_TYPE, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT) VALUES (CHAT_ROOM_SEQ.NEXTVAL, 'DM', SYSDATE, SYSDATE)
INSERT INTO CHAT_ROOM_MEMBER (ROOM_ID, EMP_NO, JOINED_AT) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{empNo}, SYSDATE)
INSERT INTO DM_ROOM_KEY (EMP_NO_A, EMP_NO_B, ROOM_ID) VALUES (#{a}, #{b}, #{roomId})
mapper.select: SELECT CRM.ROOM_ID, E.EMP_NO AS PEER_EMP_NO, E.EMP_NAME AS TITLE FROM CHAT_ROOM_MEMBER CRM JOIN CHAT_ROOM_MEMBER CRM2 ON CRM.ROOM_ID = CRM2.ROOM_ID JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON CRM2.EMP_NO = E.EMP_NO WHERE CRM.EMP_NO = #{myEmpNo} AND CRM2.EMP_NO != #{myEmpNo}
SELECT MESSAGE_ID, SENDER_EMP_NO, CONTENT, CREATED_AT FROM CHAT_MESSAGE WHERE ROOM_ID = #{activeRoomId} ORDER BY CREATED_AT ASC
